questions.question: What Washington state community did Garrison Keillor say was 'a place so nice, they named it twice'?
What 1992 Whoopi Goldberg movie was hyped: 'No sex. No booze. No men. No way'?
What Scandinavian country held off the Germans for four hours in World War II?
What's the common name for a visibly enlarged thyroid gland?
Who said, when asked what he'd have done if he lost Super Bowl III: 'I would have had a lot to drink, like I did when we won'?
What was dubbed 'The Nation's Hometown Newspaper' when it was launched in 1982?
